reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Suele haber mucha gente.....hay que hacer cola....es del ACA

(Translated by Google)
It's usually very crowded... you have to queue... it's an ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) service station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBcV9IZ1JBEAE

reviews.comment:
Vergüenza absoluta que te hagan sonar un pitido automático si te acercas al sector de los baños, al parecer no sos un ser humano apto si no compras algo ahí y pedís el permiso especial para ir al baño!!!!! Dónde se vio un desprecio así!!! Nunca más pienso comprar más nada ahí, asco el dueño de ese lugar.

(Translated by Google)
It's absolutely shameful that they make you go near the restrooms with an automatic beep. Apparently, you're not considered a human being unless you buy something there and ask for special permission to use the restroom! Where have you ever seen such contempt?! I'll never buy anything there again. The owner of that place is disgusting.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBanNua0VREAE

reviews.comment:
11 de junio 17:29 pm pedi un vanilla latte. Me dio cualquier cosa y el cafe tiene gusto a quemado intomable!

(Translated by Google)
June 11th, 5:29 pm: I ordered a vanilla latte. They gave me something and the coffee tasted burnt and was undrinkable!

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención y buenos precios, tienen varias promociones con bancos, tarjetas de distintos diarios y para socios del ACA.
Personal muy atento y capaz.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and good prices; they have several promotions with banks, newspaper credit cards, and for ACA members.
Very attentive and capable staff.
